summary: Completed testing of NEW student-specific notification feature. Backend tests: 9/9 passed. Frontend tests: All features working correctly - three target buttons, student search with debounce, student selection, notification sending to specific student, and history display.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing student 'خالد' with student_id '234' and user_id '698f86739245118463b679c9'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Student-specific notification feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/notifications/search-students?q=query returns students with full_name, student_id, user_id. POST /api/notifications/send with target_type='student' and student_user_id sends to specific student. History shows student-targeted notifications with 'طالب: [name]' badge. Frontend has 3 target buttons (الكل, حسب الدور, طالب بعينه), student search input with 400ms debounce, clickable search results. Auto Firebase push integration in server.py create_student_notification() cannot be tested via simple API calls - requires actual absence threshold to be reached.

tests_performed.notes: Returns up to 50 students with full_name, student_id, user_id
Successfully sends to specific student, saves to history

tests_performed.test: Backend: Student notification appears in history with target_desc='طالب: [name]'

tests_performed.notes: Student-targeted notifications appear with correct target_type and target_desc
Page loads with stats cards, form, and history

tests_performed.test: Frontend: Three target buttons visible (الكل, حسب الدور, طالب بعينه)
tests_performed.notes: All three buttons present and clickable

tests_performed.test: Frontend: Click 'طالب بعينه' shows student search field
tests_performed.notes: Search input appears with placeholder 'ابحث باسم الطالب أو رقمه'

tests_performed.test: Frontend: Search for student '234' returns results
tests_performed.notes: Debounced search (400ms) returns matching students (خالد, محمد أحمد علي, etc.)

tests_performed.test: Frontend: Click search result to select student
tests_performed.notes: Student is selected and shown in UI

tests_performed.test: Frontend: Send notification to selected student
tests_performed.notes: Notification sent successfully, appears in history with 'طالب: خالد' badge

tests_performed.test: Frontend: Stats card updates after sending
tests_performed.notes: إشعارات مرسلة count increased from 16 to 17

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features tested successfully. Note: Direct navigation to /manage-notifications loses auth context (401 errors). Must navigate via login flow or use window.location after login.
